_comment: Target (optimal) values and allowed tolerance for every slider in each of the 7 industrial workshops in the Advanced Laser & Optics Learning Lab (labs/advanced-laser-optics-lab.html). A student's score on a slider is 100% at 'optimal' and falls to 0% once they are 'tolerance' away from it. Edit any number below and reload the lab page - no other file needs to change. wsLidar_trueDistance_m is the hidden true target distance (metres) for the LIDAR workshop; the true echo time shown to students is calculated from it.
